sys_script_include.description:
v 2.7
This file should always remain Active = false This file will be read only so customers don't use it, but create thier own version in the Tasker app to avoid us overwriting on a future release This file: - Provides an example of what should go in the customer's script include to customize an existing ACL on a field - Provides an example of the code that would chagne in an existing ACL (from and to) - Provides an example of what should go in the customer's script include to create a function for a customer's custom field - Provides an example of what should go in the customer's ACL for a customer's custom field - STRY0112587 - Added Task Executive Role
sys_script_include.name: example_ACL_Customization
